author: aarshshahoffchain
content: <@412614104222531604> Is there a way to ensure in the Kurtosis config that the spammor only submits blobs tx to a specific client ?

author: aarshshahoffchain
content:
My current spammor config is:

"""
spamoor_params:
  image: ethpandaops/spamoor:master
  max_mem: 4000
  spammers:
    - scenario: eoatx
      config:
        throughput: 200
    - scenario: blobs
      config:
        throughput: 20
"""

author: barnabasbusa
content: yeah

author: barnabasbusa
content: you can do `client_group`

author: aarshshahoffchain
content: Can you help me with a sample config please ?

author: barnabasbusa
content:
```
spamoor_params:
  image: ethpandaops/spamoor:master
  spammers:
    - scenario: eoatx
      config:
        throughput: 100
        client_group: prysm-geth-1
```

author: aarshshahoffchain
content: Thanks !

author: barnabasbusa
content: looks like thats not an actual group lol

author: barnabasbusa
content: you can use client_group: 1 tho

author: barnabasbusa
content: I'll add the full name of the client in it too

author: aarshshahoffchain
content: I am doing this for local testing so will the use the right group.
